environment.name: AOT_CONFIG_CONTENT
environment.value:
receivers:
  otlp:
    protocols:
      grpc:
        endpoint: 0.0.0.0:4317
      http:
        endpoint: 0.0.0.0:4318
  prometheus:
    config:
      scrape_configs:
        - job_name: quickfood-catalog
          scrape_interval: 10s
          static_configs:
            - targets: ["localhost:3333"]
processors:
  batch:
    timeout: 5s
    send_batch_size: 1024
  resourcedetection:
    detectors: [env, ecs]
    timeout: 5s
exporters:
  awsxray:
    region: us-east-1
  awsemf:
    region: us-east-1
    namespace: QuickFood
    log_group_name: /ecs/quickfood/metrics
    dimension_rollup_option: NoDimensionRollup
  otlphttp/grafana:
    endpoint: ${GRAFANA_OTLP_ENDPOINT}
    headers:
      Authorization: Basic ${GRAFANA_OTLP_AUTH}
service:
  pipelines:
    traces:
      receivers: [otlp]
      processors: [resourcedetection, batch]
      exporters: [awsxray, otlphttp/grafana]
    metrics:
      receivers: [otlp, prometheus]
      processors: [resourcedetection, batch]
      exporters: [awsemf, otlphttp/grafana]
    logs:
      receivers: [otlp]
      processors: [resourcedetection, batch]
      exporters: [otlphttp/grafana]
